title: heap-buffer-overflow in ANGLE for Chromium on MacOS
bounty_rationale: report of memory corruption in a highly privileged process (GPU)
description_snippet:
**Summary:** heap-buffer-overflow in ANGLE for Chromium on MacOS

**Program:** Google VRP

**Vulnerability type:** Memory Corruption (in a non-sandboxed process)

### Details

**Vulnerability Description**

A heap buffer overflow can be triggered in rx::TextureMtl::convertAndSetPerSliceSubImage on t
